facebook:
If you've been in a car accident in Corpus Christi, the moments and days that follow can feel completely overwhelming. Between dealing with insurance companies, managing injuries, and trying to get back to normal life, it's easy to miss steps that could seriously impact your case.

Here's something many people don't realize: Texas has a 2-year statute of limitations for car accident claims. That clock starts the day of your accident — and it doesn't pause while you're recovering or waiting to hear back from an adjuster.

The good news? You don't have to figure this out alone. Knowing what to document at the scene, when to contact an attorney, and how to handle insurance communications can make a huge difference in the outcome of your claim.

We put together a complete 2026 guide specifically for Corpus Christi drivers to walk you through every step after a crash.

Have you or a loved one ever been unsure about what to do after an accident — and wished you'd had better guidance sooner?
reddit_title: Got into a car accident in Corpus Christi, TX — here's what the 2-year statute of limitations actually means for your claim
reddit_body:
If you've recently been in a car accident in Corpus Christi or anywhere in Texas, one of the most important things to understand upfront is the statute of limitations. Texas gives you 2 years from the date of the accident to file a personal injury lawsuit. That might sound like plenty of time, but between recovering, dealing with insurance back-and-forth, and just getting life back on track, it goes faster than you'd expect.

At the scene, make sure you document everything you can — photos of all vehicles, road conditions, any visible injuries, and witness contact info. Even if you feel fine, see a doctor promptly. Delayed injury symptoms are common after collisions, and a gap in medical care can be used against you by insurance adjusters later.

When it comes to legal representation, don't just go with the first name you find. It helps to work with an attorney who has specific experience handling Texas auto accident claims and understands local Corpus Christi courts. If you're not sure where to start, wreckmatch.com matches accident victims with vetted local attorneys for free — no pressure, just a faster way to find someone qualified for your situation.
